name: unfreedom-of-the-press
description: Mark Levin's 'Unfreedom of the Press' — a conservative critique of how the American news media has transformed from a free press into a tool of political activism and government propaganda.
useCase: Understand the history of the American press, media bias, the First Amendment, and how to consume news critically.
knownRisks: Strongly partisan perspective — Levin is a conservative commentator
Controversial claims about media behavior that are disputed
Focuses primarily on American media — limited relevance outside the US
